ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Debit of Rs. 5,000 from your account
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We would like to inform you that a debit of Rs. 5,000 has been made from your savings account ending in 1234 on 10th Apr 2026 at 14:32. The transaction was made at ABC Retail, Mumbai.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our 24/7 support immediately.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected a security incident with your Microsoft 365 account. According to Microsoft policy, passwords must be changed every 90 days. Your current password is set to expire on 15th May 2026.

To keep your account active and avoid disruption, please login to the Microsoft portal and reset your password immediately.

Login here: <URL>

If you do not reset within 48 hours, your account will be blocked. For further assistance, contact Microsoft Support at <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
